method: PU-aware LR + grouped-artist bootstrap (n=300) percentile stability intervals; discovery = pref_pct x obscurity^g

caveats: Preference scores are cross-validated percentiles vs. weak negatives, NOT calibrated P(love).
Bootstrap bands are ranking-stability intervals over artist resamples, not confidence intervals.
Candidate pool is authored by 16 taste-adjacent artist searches; gems outside those neighborhoods are invisible.
